Professional Lab Technician

Reliable lab support with a focus on precision, safety, and efficiency.

Services

  • Sample preparation and handling
  • Equipment calibration and maintenance
  • Data recording and quality control

Contact

© Lab Technician

Lab Technician Landing Page

A minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. The page is responsive, uses a red/black/white color scheme, includes a hero with title and subtitle, a brief services list, and a contact form that shows an alert on submit (no backend).

Features
- Single HTML page
- Responsive meta viewport
- Hero section with title and subtitle
- Services list
- Contact form (name, email, message) that triggers an alert on submit
- Only red, black, and white colors used

Getting started
- Install dependencies: npm install
- Run tests: npm test
- Open the site: open the index.html file in your browser (double-click or serve via a simple static server)

Project structure
- index.html — Single-page site
- styles.css — Styles (red/black/white only)
- script.js — Contact form alert logic
- tests/hero.test.js — Jest test to verify hero title exists
- package.json — Test scripts and dev dependency

Notes
- There is no backend; the contact form is purely client-side and displays a confirmation alert.

notes: Open index.html directly in a browser to view the page.
Run `npm install` then `npm test` to execute the Jest test that checks the hero title.
